targets.queryText:
SELECT start_timestamp AS time, total_minutes AS value
FROM sleep_sessions
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND start_timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '-29 days')
ORDER BY start_timestamp;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT start_timestamp AS time, total_minutes AS value
FROM sleep_sessions
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND start_timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '-29 days')
ORDER BY start_timestamp;

targets.queryText:
SELECT start_timestamp, end_timestamp, total_minutes, state, is_provisional
FROM sleep_sessions
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
ORDER BY end_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 14;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT start_timestamp, end_timestamp, total_minutes, state, is_provisional
FROM sleep_sessions
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
ORDER BY end_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 14;

targets.queryText:
SELECT timestamp AS time, value
FROM hrv_samples
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '-6 days')
ORDER BY timestamp;

SELECT timestamp AS time, value
FROM hrv_samples

  AND timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '-6 days')
ORDER BY timestamp;

FROM blood_oxygen_samples

  AND timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '-6 days')
ORDER BY timestamp;

targets.queryText:
SELECT hr.timestamp AS time, hr.reading AS value
FROM heart_rates hr
JOIN sleep_sessions ss
  ON ss.device_id = hr.device_id
WHERE hr.device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND ss.device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND ss.end_timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '-6 days')
  AND hr.timestamp >= ss.start_timestamp
  AND hr.timestamp <= ss.end_timestamp
ORDER BY hr.timestamp;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT hr.timestamp AS time, hr.reading AS value
FROM heart_rates hr
JOIN sleep_sessions ss
  ON ss.device_id = hr.device_id
WHERE hr.device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND ss.device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND ss.end_timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '-6 days')
  AND hr.timestamp >= ss.start_timestamp
  AND hr.timestamp <= ss.end_timestamp
ORDER BY hr.timestamp;

targets.queryText:
SELECT ss.start_timestamp, ss.end_timestamp, st.sequence_index, st.stage, st.start_timestamp AS stage_start, st.end_timestamp AS stage_end, st.minutes
FROM sleep_sessions ss
JOIN sleep_stage_samples st ON st.sleep_session_id = ss.sleep_session_id
WHERE ss.device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
ORDER BY ss.end_timestamp DESC, st.sequence_index ASC
LIMIT 60;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT ss.start_timestamp, ss.end_timestamp, st.sequence_index, st.stage, st.start_timestamp AS stage_start, st.end_timestamp AS stage_end, st.minutes
FROM sleep_sessions ss
JOIN sleep_stage_samples st ON st.sleep_session_id = ss.sleep_session_id
WHERE ss.device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
ORDER BY ss.end_timestamp DESC, st.sequence_index ASC
LIMIT 60;
